evidence.source_excerpt: Engage with brilliant faculty and bold research at the University of California, Riverside (UCR). Choose from over 150 majors and minors, and be guided by leaders in your field of interest. You'll be empowered by peer mentors, learning communities, internships, and undergraduate research as early as your first year.
